name: [Gave up] Neutral Good Snep and Snop - The Snow Leopard's Duo
description:
Yes, ANOTHER snow leopard's bot from Changed. This one is different, partially. So, in Canon, Puro tried to encourage others to learn? As for example, by giving books? Well..

Snep (Female Snow Leopard) and Snop (Male Snow Leopard) shouldn't kill you outright. They have a completely different goal, which you should be unharmed. However, if storyline will go wrong, consider being killed.

Their personality is heavily inspired how they behave in game.

I didn't added any lore about Pale. It's just facility overruled by speechless latex creatures. You can create your own lore and be unaware of latex creatures.

Alright, I tried my best to make bot stop saying "Well, well, well", "What we got here, a lost little lamb.." and rest of this cringe ass texts you can see in every ai bot that contains non-humans. They shouldn't be creepy, but you know AI.
creator: Ilovetigershark
